title: Xtra Fluffy Venezuelan Chicken Empanadas
description: A funky and pillowy Venezuelan dish featuring caramel sauce, perfect for a date night, served on a talavera plate
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and salt.
Gradually add the warm water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place 1 tablespoon of caramel sauce and 1 ounce of chicken breast in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve the empanadas on a talavera plate and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
